_comment: Setup: cd mcp-servers && npm install (runs prepare → tsc → dist/).
Default VAULT_PATH/PROJECT_PATH use ${workspaceFolder}. Override in mcp-servers/.env if needed; never commit .env.
Servers run compiled JS under dist/ (no ts-node) for stable startup on Node 22.
If tools fail after TS edits, run: cd mcp-servers && npm run build.
